title: Supplementary material for Proctor et al., "Warm temperature inhibits cytoplasmic incompatibility induced by endosymbiotic Rickettsiella in a spider host"
author: Proctor, Jordyn
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Included are two supplemental files: SupplementaryDocument1 includes primers and cycling conditions for qPCR quanitification of the symbiont Rickettsiella. SupplementaryDocument2 includes all raw data for the experiments included in this manuscript.
steps_raw: Included are two supplemental files: SupplementaryDocument1 includes primers and cycling conditions for qPCR quanitification of the symbiont Rickettsiella. SupplementaryDocument2 includes all raw data for the experiments included in this manuscript.
